assertions.assertion: Creates a class that extends DynamicClientRegistrationValidator
assertions.rationale: Code shows `public class CustomDcrValidator : DynamicClientRegistrationValidator` extending the base class.

assertions.assertion: Overrides ValidateGrantTypesAsync to reject grant types other than authorization_code
assertions.rationale: Overrides ValidateGrantTypesAsync and checks `if (grantTypes.Any(gt => gt != "authorization_code"))` calling context.SetError to reject.

assertions.assertion: Overrides ValidateRedirectUrisAsync to enforce HTTPS on all redirect URIs
assertions.rationale: Overrides ValidateRedirectUrisAsync and checks `if (uris.Any(u => !u.StartsWith("https://", ...)))` calling context.SetError to reject non-HTTPS URIs.

assertions.assertion: Sets RequirePkce = true in SetClientDefaultsAsync or equivalent override
Registers the validator using AddDynamicClientRegistrationValidator<T>() on the configuration builder
